code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut last = ""
mut found = false
mut line_start = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_break = false
  if i == n
    is_break = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        is_break = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  if is_break
    let line = string.substring(s, line_start, i)
    let m = string.len(line)
    mut end_idx = m
    mut stripping = true
    while stripping
      if end_idx == 0
        stripping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, end_idx - 1)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
            end_idx = end_idx - 1
          else
            stripping = false
          end
        when None
          stripping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if end_idx > 0
      last = line
      found = true
    end
    line_start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println(last)
else
  println("(none)")
end
